conversations.content: Today we studied the Yuanhang Logistics Warehouse Management Standards. If a warehouse clerk, without checking the manifest, sends out the wrong hazardous materials container...
Shipped the wrong container? And hazardous materials? They need to retrieve it immediately.
And that container has already been loaded onto a transport vehicle and has left the factory area.
Already left the factory? That's extremely risky — could cause an accident! What measures does the shift supervisor have?

then the shift supervisor may fine the warehouse clerk one month's salary and transfer them to a sorting post, or immediately report the incident to the customer and transportation authorities and pay all cleanup and compensation costs.

think: Yuanhang Logistics warehouse: clerk sends wrong hazmat container + container already shipped out → fine one month salary + transfer to sorting post OR report to customer and authorities + pay all cleanup and compensation costs.
memory: Yuanhang Logistics Warehouse Management Standards: If a warehouse clerk, without checking the manifest, sends out the wrong hazardous materials container, and that container has already been loaded onto a transport vehicle and has left the factory area, then the shift supervisor may fine the warehouse clerk one month's salary and transfer them to a sorting post, or immediately report the incident to the customer and transportation authorities and pay all cleanup and compensation costs.
